info.title: FeatureScript Standard Library - Features-Patterns
info.description: Pattern and copy — circular, linear, curve patterns, mirror, transform copy

symbols.name: circularPattern
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Performs a body, face, or feature circular pattern. Internally, performs an `applyPattern`, which in turn performs an `opPattern` or, for a feature pattern, calls the feature function.

subfields.name: patternType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies a `PART`, `FEATURE`, or `FACE` pattern. Default is `PART`.

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description:
Required if `patternType` is `PART`The parts to pattern. 
 Example: 
`qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)`

subfields.name: faces
subfields.description: Required if `patternType` is `FACE`The faces to pattern.

subfields.name: instanceFunction
subfields.description: Required if `patternType` is `FEATURE`The `FeatureList` of the features to pattern.

subfields.name: axis
subfields.description: The axis of the pattern.

subfields.name: angle
subfields.description:
The angle between each pattern instance, or the total angle spanned by the pattern if `equalSpace` is `true`. 
 Example: 
`360 * degree`

subfields.name: instanceCount
subfields.description:
The resulting number of pattern entities, unless `isCentered` is `true`. 
 Example: 
`4 to have 4 resulting pattern entities (including the seed).`

subfields.name: oppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to switch the direction of the pattern around the axis.`

subfields.name: equalSpace
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true for the entire pattern to lie within angle` Example: 
`false for there to be angle between each pattern instance (default)`

subfields.name: isCentered
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to center the pattern on the seed. When set to `true`, `instanceCount - 1` pattern entities are created in each direction around the axis. Default is `false`.

subfields.name: operationType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

subfields.name: defaultScope
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to merge with all other bodies` Example: 
`false to merge with booleanScope`

subfields.name: booleanScope
subfields.description: Required if `defaultScope` is `false`The specified bodies to merge with.

subfields.name: skipInstances
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to exclude certain instances of the pattern.

subfields.name: skippedInstances
subfields.description:
Required if `skipInstances` is `true`Which instances of the pattern to skip. Each is denoted by a single index, which may be negative if `isCentered` is `true`. 
 Example: 
`[{ index: -3 }, { index: 2 }, { index: 5 }]`

symbols.name: CurvePatternSpacingType
symbols.description: Specifies the type of spacing between pattern instances.

values.name: EQUAL
values.description: Equal-spaced instances along the length of curve

symbols.name: curvePattern
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Performs a body, face, or feature curve pattern. Internally, performs an `applyPattern`, which in turn performs an `opPattern` or, for a feature pattern, calls the feature function.

subfields.name: patternType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies a `PART`, `FEATURE`, or `FACE` pattern. Default is `PART`.

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description:
Required if `patternType` is `PART`The parts to pattern. 
 Example: 
`qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)`

subfields.name: faces
subfields.description: Required if `patternType` is `FACE`The faces to pattern.

subfields.name: instanceFunction
subfields.description: Required if `patternType` is `FEATURE`The `FeatureList` of the features to pattern.

subfields.name: edges
subfields.description: A `Query` for a set of edges to pattern along. The edges must form a continuous path.

subfields.name: spacingType
subfields.description: Specifies the type of spacing between pattern entities. Default is `EQUAL`.

subfields.name: distance
subfields.description:
Required if `spacingType` is `DISTANCE`The distance between each pattern entity. 
 Example: 
`1.0 * inch to space the pattern entities 1 inch apart.`

subfields.name: instanceCount
subfields.description:
The resulting number of pattern entities. 
 Example: 
`2 to have 2 resulting pattern entities (including the seed).`

subfields.name: keepOrientation
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true for the pattern entities to keep the orientation of the seed` Example: 
`false for the pattern entities to reorient along the path (default)`

subfields.name: operationType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

subfields.name: defaultScope
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to merge with all other bodies` Example: 
`false to merge with booleanScope`

subfields.name: booleanScope
subfields.description: Required if `defaultScope` is `false`The specified bodies to merge with.

subfields.name: skipInstances
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to exclude certain instances of the pattern.

subfields.name: skippedInstances
subfields.description:
Required if `skipInstances` is `true`Which instances of the pattern to skip. Each is denoted by a single positive index. 
 Example: 
`[{ index: 2 }, { index: 5 }]`

symbols.name: linearPattern
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Performs a body, face, or feature linear pattern. Internally, performs an `applyPattern`, which in turn performs an `opPattern` or, for a feature pattern, calls the feature function.

subfields.name: patternType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies a `PART`, `FEATURE`, or `FACE` pattern. Default is `PART`.

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description:
Required if `patternType` is `PART`The parts to pattern. 
 Example: 
`qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)`

subfields.name: faces
subfields.description: Required if `patternType` is `FACE`The faces to pattern.

subfields.name: instanceFunction
subfields.description: Required if `patternType` is `FEATURE`The `FeatureList` of the features to pattern.

subfields.name: directionOne
subfields.description:
The direction of the pattern. 
 Example: 
`qCreatedBy(newId() + "Right", EntityType.FACE)`

subfields.name: distance
subfields.description:
The distance between each pattern entity. 
 Example: 
`1.0 * inch to space the pattern entities 1 inch apart.`

subfields.name: instanceCount
subfields.description:
The resulting number of pattern entities, unless `isCentered` is `true`. 
 Example: 
`2 to have 2 resulting pattern entities (including the seed).`

subfields.name: oppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to switch the direction of the pattern along directionOne.`

subfields.name: isCentered
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to center the pattern on the seed. When set to `true`, `instanceCount - 1` pattern entities are created along each direction of `directionOne`. Default is `false`.

subfields.name: hasSecondDir
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true if the pattern should extend in two directions rather than one, creating a grid of pattern entities.`

subfields.name: directionTwo
subfields.description: Required if `hasSecondDir` is `true`The second direction of the pattern.

subfields.name: distanceTwo
subfields.description: Required if `hasSecondDir` is `true`The distance between each pattern entity in the second direction.

subfields.name: instanceCountTwo
subfields.description: Required if `hasSecondDir` is `true`The resulting number of pattern entities in the second direction, unless `isCentered` is `true`.

subfields.name: oppositeDirectionTwo
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to switch the direction of the pattern along directionTwo.`

subfields.name: isCenteredTwo
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to center the second direction of the pattern on the seed. When set to `true`, `instanceCount - 1` pattern entities are created along each direction of `directionTwo`. Default is `false`.

subfields.name: operationType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

subfields.name: defaultScope
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to merge with all other bodies` Example: 
`false to merge with booleanScope`

subfields.name: booleanScope
subfields.description: Required if `defaultScope` is `false`The specified bodies to merge with.

subfields.name: skipInstances
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to exclude certain instances of the pattern.

subfields.name: skippedInstances
subfields.description:
Required if `skipInstances` is `true`Which instances of the pattern to skip. Each is denoted by one index for each direction, either of which may be negative if `isCentered` or `isCenteredTwo` respectively is `true`. 
 Example: 
`[{ index1: -3, index2: 1 }, { index1: 0, index2: -2 }, { index1: 5, index2: 0 }]`

symbols.name: mirror
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature creating a single copy of some features, bodies, or faces, mirrored about a given entity. Internally, performs an `applyPattern`, which in turn performs an `opPattern` or, for a feature mirror, calls the feature function.

symbols.name: TransformType
symbols.description: Defines how a the transform for a `transform` feature should be specified. SCALE_UNIFORMLY actually also supports non-uniform scaling.

symbols.name: transform
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description:
Move and/or rotate bodies or mate connectors with a single `Transform`, constructed with input according to the selected `TransformType`.
Internally, performs an `opTransform` when not copying, and an `opPattern` when copying. For simple transforms, prefer calling `opTransform` or `opPattern` directly.

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description:
The bodies or mate connectors to transform. An error is thrown if anything else is included. 
 Example: 
`qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.BODY)`

subfields.name: transformType
subfields.description:
Defines how the transform type should be specified. 
 Example: 
`TransformType.TRANSLATION_3D`

subfields.name: dx
subfields.description:
Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_3D`A value with length units specifying the distance to move in the world `x` direction. 
 Example: 
`1 * inch`

subfields.name: dy
subfields.description:
Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_3D`A value with length units specifying the distance to move in the world `y` direction. 
 Example: 
`1 * inch`

subfields.name: dz
subfields.description:
Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_3D`A value with length units specifying the distance to move in the world `z` direction. 
 Example: 
`1 * inch`

subfields.name: transformLine
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_ENTITY`A `Query` for either a single line or a pair of points, specifying the direction and distance to transform.

subfields.name: oppositeDirectionEntity
subfields.description:
Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_ENTITY` Example: 
`true to flip the transform direction.`

subfields.name: transformAxis
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.ROTATION`A `Query` for a line, cylinder, etc. to specify the transform direction.

subfields.name: angle
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.ROTATION`A value with angle units specifying the angle to rotate.

subfields.name: transformDirection
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_DISTANCE`A `Query` for either a single line or a pair of points, specifying the direction to transform.

subfields.name: distance
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_DISTANCE`A value with length units specifying the distance to move.

subfields.name: oppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSLATION_DISTANCE` or `TransformType.ROTATION` Example: 
`true to transform in the opposite direction.`

subfields.name: uniform
subfields.description: OptionalTrue if the scale is uniform in all directions (default)

subfields.name: scale
subfields.requiredIf: transformType is TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY and uniform is true
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY` and `uniform` is trueA positive real number specifying the scale factor.

subfields.name: scalePoint
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY`A point specifying the center of the scale or a mate connector specifying the coordinate system for a non-uniform scale.

subfields.name: scaleX
subfields.requiredIf: transformType is TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY and uniform is false
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY` and `uniform` is false

subfields.name: scaleY
subfields.requiredIf: transformType is TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY and uniform is false
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY` and `uniform` is false

subfields.name: scaleZ
subfields.requiredIf: transformType is TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY and uniform is false
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.SCALE_UNIFORMLY` and `uniform` is false

subfields.name: baseConnector
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSFORM_MATE_CONNECTORS`The mate connector to transform from.

subfields.name: destinationConnector
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSFORM_MATE_CONNECTORS`The mate connector to transform to.

subfields.name: oppositeDirectionMateAxis
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSFORM_MATE_CONNECTORS`

subfields.name: secondaryAxisType
subfields.description: Required if `transformType` is `TransformType.TRANSFORM_MATE_CONNECTORS`

subfields.name: makeCopy
subfields.description:
Required if `transformType` is not `TransformType.COPY` Example: 
`true to keep the original bodies.`

symbols.name: copyPart
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Deprecated: Use `opPattern`, or the `transform` feature instead.
